property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, lower your opponent's anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Physical attack. If this attack is stopped, your opponent's Main Personality loses 2 power stages to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack. Remove an opponent's Drill in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Place the bottom 4 cards from your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If your opponent's Main Personality is a hero, this attack does +5 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of each player's turn, that player discards the top card from his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks cost +2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you perform a successful attack, choose 1 card at random from your opponent's hand and shuffle it into his Life Deck, then your opponent draws 1 card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 3 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, raise your Main Personality 5 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage and 1 power stage of damage. If successful and you declared a Tokui-Waza, remove the bottom 6 cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent discards 2 cards from the top of his Life Deck for each anger level he is at above 0. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may have your opponent shuffle his hand into his Life Deck, and then draw the same number of cards. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. You may choose to have your Main Personality lose any number of power stages, to a minimum of 0. For every 2 power stages you lose in this way, lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger to 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard 1 of your opponent's Drills in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, lower all players' anger levels to 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Choose 1 of your opponent's Drills in play. Your opponent cannot use the power of that Drill for the remainder of the game. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Stops an energy attack. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Choose 1 Namekian Style card in your discard pile and shuffle it into your Life Deck. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Your opponent's Main Personality cannot use its personality power for the remainder of combat until it performs an energy attack. You may have up to 8 copies of his card in your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Prevent all but 2 life cards of damage from an energy attack. For every life card of Base Damage that attack would have dealt, your Main Personality gains 1 power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs 2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this card remains in play to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your opponent's Life Deck and remove 1 non-Dragon Ball card from the game. Your opponent searches your Life Deck and removes 1 non-Dragon Ball card from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Every successful physical attack performed against you for the remainder of Combat raises your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks performed against you for the remainder of Combat cost +2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Stops the next physical attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for 1 Ally and place it in play at 3 power stages above 0. If you declared Tokui-Waza, search your discard pile for 1 Ally and place it in play at 3 power stages above 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach this card to your opponent's Main Personality. Your opponent may not use his Main Personality's personality power while this card is attached. Discard this card when your opponent places a Dragon Ball in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If this attack is performed by Android 17, your opponent must skip his next attack phase.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If this attack is performed by Android 17, this attack does 7 power stages of damage instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose a card from your discard pile and place it on top of your Life Deck. Name a non-Dragon Ball card and search your opponent's Life Deck for 1 copy of that card and remove it from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: All attacks you perform do +1 life card of damage. If that attack is performed by a personality with "Android" in the card title, then the attack does +2 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: All physical attacks do +1 power stage of damage. All energy attacks do +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: All named cards cost +2 life cards to play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing X power stages of damage. X is equal to the total anger of all players.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If successful, you may discard a card from your hand. If you do, your opponent must choose to either discard a card at random from his hand or lose 4 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, choose a card at random from your opponent's hand. Your opponent shuffles that card into his Life Deck and draws a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, stops the next attack your opponent performs against your this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise all personalities in play to their highest power stage. Choose 2 cards from your discard pile and put them on the bottom of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any personality to its highest power stage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may also end Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared Tokui-Waza, search your opponent's Life Deck for 2 non-Dragon Ball cards and remove them from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, name a non-Dragon Ball card. Search your opponent's Life Deck for 1 copy of that card and discard it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, draw a card. Then choose a card from your hand and place it on top of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, remove an opponent's Non-Combat card or Ally in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponents may only place 1 Non-Combat card in play from their hand during their turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 power stage of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may do 6 life cards of damage instead. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does 5 power stages of damage instead. If successful, Combat ends after damage, if any, is dealt.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat. Your opponent discards a card at random from his hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, draw the bottom card from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may place this card into play from your hand after taking damage from one of your opponents attacks.) Your opponent discards the top 3 cards from his Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Choose up to 3 cards in your discard pile and shuffle them into your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If you declared Tokui-Waza, place the top card from your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks do +1 life card of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, all of your energy attacks do +2 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does +X life cards of damage. X is equal to the number of Dragon Balls in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you perform a successful energy attack, you may do -2 life cards of damage to remove 1 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does +X life cards of damage. X is equal to the current personality level of the personality that performed this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful and you declared Tokui-Waza, your opponent must pass in his next attack phase. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, remove an opponent's Non-Combat card or Ally in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful and you declared Tokui-Waza, your opponent must discard all of his Drills in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may pay 2 power stages to search your Life Deck for an Energy Combat card, show it to your opponent, and place it in your hand. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponents may not use their Allies during Combat while this Drill is in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, after performing a successful attack, you may choose 1 card in your discard pile and shuffle it into your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may discard the top card from your Life Deck when this card is played to do +6 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. If the bottom card of your discard pile is a Saiyan Style card, your opponent's Main Personality loses 4 power stages to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful and you declared Tokui-Waza, discard up to 2 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards or Allies in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful and you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does +4 life cards of damage and raises your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, your opponent's Main Personality loses 3 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does +3 power stages of damage and remains in play to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your Main Personality and all of your Allies to their highest power stage. Use when needed. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Your opponent draws a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Costs 2 power stages to perform. If successful, raise your opponent's anger 6 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. Lower your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat. Raise your anger 1 level. Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Draw the bottom card from your discard pile. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, end Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for 2 Allies and place them in play at 5 power stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Choose 1 opponent and remove all of his Drills in play from the game. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Look at your opponent's hand and choose a card. Your opponent discards that card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Place the bottom 4 cards from your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Non-Combat cards may not be used.

property.name: Text
property.value: Any cards or effects that raise a Main Personality's anger more than 1 anger level only raises his anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Each player has his Main Personality's PUR reduced by 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever a non-Dragon Ball card goes to its owner's discard pile, it is removed from the game instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: If you declared a Tokui-Waza, whenever your opponent places in play a Non-Combat card, you may discard the top 5 cards from your Life Deck to remove that Non-Combat card from the game. Your opponent may not use that Non-Combat card. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Name any Combat, Physical Combat, or Energy Combat card. All of your opponents must search their Life Decks for all copies of that card and remove them from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, search your Life Deck for any 1 card and place it in your hand. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Place this card on your opponent's Main Personality. Your opponent lowers his anger to 0 and he may not raise his anger level until he places an Ally in play. Discard this card when your opponent places an Ally in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Players may not use Non-combat/non-Drill cards during combat unless they have performed an attack from their hand this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: You must have an Ally in play to use this card. Discard all of your opponents' Non-Combat cards in play. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise all of your Allies to their highest power stage. You may use all of your allies currently in play's personality powers this Combat, even if your Main Personality is at 2 power stages above 0 or higher. Discard 1 card from the top of your Life Deck for each Ally you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If you declared Tokui-Waza, this attack does 7 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack. You may search your Life Deck for any colorless Drill and place it in play at the end of Combat. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, you may search your Life Deck for any Orange Drill card and place it in play at the end of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Play this as your first card in Combat. Physical attack doing +8 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Your opponent discards the top 3 cards from his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Your anger may not be lowered while this Drill is in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza, you may discard the top card from your Life Deck to do an additional +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Your opponent loses 4 power stages to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Place this card on your opponent's Main Personality. Your opponent lowers his anger to 0 and he may not raise his anger level until he places a Drill in play. Discard this card when your opponent places a Drill into play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 1 life card of damage. This attack also does +1 life card of damage for every card in your discard pile with "Tien" in the title. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Every successful energy attack performed against Android 16 lowers your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your anger level cannot be lowered.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped attack performed against you this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Any 1 of your Allies loses any number of power stages you chose, to a minimum of 0. Raise Android 19's power stages by that same number.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Pay 5 power stages to search your Life Deck or discard pile for any 1 personality with "Android" in the card title. Place the chosen personality card in play at 5 power stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Choose one of your opponent's personalities in play. For the remainder of the turn, that personality cannot use his personality power and Constant Combat Powers on his current personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, you may use 1 of your Non-Combat cards already in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Physical attacks performed by Vegeta do +1 power stage of damage for every Ally your opponent has in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 0 power stages to perform.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also capture an opponent's Dragon Ball.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: Ultra Rare

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Use at the end of Combat. Reduce all of your opponent's personalities to 0 power stages. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: Ultra Rare

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Once per Combat, in place of an attack, you may place in play a Non-Combat card from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose 1 card at random from your opponent’s hand. Your opponent shuffles that card into his Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. You may not perform energy attacks for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Stops all physical or energy attacks for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Place this card on your opponent's Main Personality. Your opponent lowers his anger to 0 anf he may not raise his anger level until he places a Dragon Ball card in play. Discard this card when your opponent places a Dragon Ball card in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Reduce your opponent's Main Personality to its level 1 personality card. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search any opponent's Life Deck for all copies of all Dragon Balls and set them aside. Shuffle that opponent's Life Deck and place those Dragon Balls at the bottom of his Life Deck in any order.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: If your Main Personality is a hero, choose up to 3 Non-Combat cards in your discard pile and place them on top of your Life Deck. If your Main Personality is a villain, shuffle all Combat cards in your discard pile into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when needed. Raise all of your personalities to their highest power stage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw a card. If that card is a named card, show it to your opponent and draw another card. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical or energy attack. You may choose to discard a card from your hand. If you do, your opponent's Main Personality loses 2 power stages. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Your opponent discards the top 3 cards from his Life Deck. You may only defend for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If the defending personality has "Android" in the card title, search your discard pile for 1 card with "Android" in the card title and place it in your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Lower your opponent's anger to 0 at the end of this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower your opponent's anger to 0. You must pass in your next attack phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Each player has his Main Personality's PUR increased by 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 8 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger to 0. Limit 1 per deck.
